scores.justification: The related-work section now covers the differentiable-design axis the reframe requires (QDO, SQcircuit line, SQuADDS, photonics inverse-design genus + instances, JAX-FEM, TensorGalerkin, libCEED foil, V&V/benchmarking tradition) on the merits, litsearch-substrate-backed; 57 complete entries, zero unused.

scores.fix: Resolve the TODO(operator) repository URL and archival DOI so the committed artifacts are reachable by an arXiv reader.
scores.justification: Every number traces to a committed artifact with pinning tests and full hardware/commit provenance, but the repository URL/DOI footnote remains TODO(operator) — no stable public artifact reference exists yet from the preprint alone.

The ~250-word abstract states the gap, the capability, the honest negatives, and the credential; contributions are one sentence per item on the first pages — a triaging arXiv reader gets the claim and its boundary immediately.

physics.comp-ph remains correct for a differentiable-solver methods paper and the reframed headline strengthens the quant-ph cross-list case; the abstract's framing matches comp-ph reader expectations for solver/method papers.

findings.rationale: arXiv readers triage reproducibility on a working repository link; the footnote defers it to submission time.
findings.suggested_fix: Operator supplies the repository URL and archival DOI before submission.
